one_time_description: Indigenous Services Canada flood response funding received and deferred ($4,871,709 received, $2,527,345 recognized in year)
economic_notes: Nation has investments in Shackan Development Corporation (100%), K'en T'em Limited Partnership (12.50%), and Spayum Holdings Limited Partnership (20%), accounted for using modified equity method. Combined total investment value $1,847,981. Net loss from business entities of $155,728 in 2022.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Three business entities accounted for using modified equity method (not consolidated): Shackan Development Corporation, K'en T'em Limited Partnership, Spayum Holdings Limited Partnership. Large ISC flood response funding of $4,871,709 received in year with $2,344,364 remaining deferred. CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative also partially deferred ($230,512 remaining). No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Accounts receivable increased significantly by $4,464,416 during the year. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC and other government transfers (CMHC, Citxw Nlaka'pamux Assembly, FNESC, Province of BC, First Nation Health Authority, Government of Canada = $5,698,128 total government transfers).
